/usr/bin/c++ -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/sysmonitor.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/sysmonitor.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/sysmonitor.dir/src/CpuCollector.cpp.o CMakeFiles/sysmonitor.dir/src/MemoryCollector.cpp.o CMakeFiles/sysmonitor.dir/src/TempCollector.cpp.o CMakeFiles/sysmonitor.dir/src/SystemMonitor.cpp.o CMakeFiles/sysmonitor.dir/src/Logger.cpp.o -o sysmonitor  -lcurses /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libform.so
